name: Payment verification returns 404 for unknown PA domain

steps.name: Given that checkout host is configured through environment variable
And the checkout NPG environment variables are configured
When the user verifies the payment for the unknown domain notice code
Then the response has status code 404
And the fault code detail contains "PPT_DOMINIO_SCONOSCIUTO"

fullName: Checkout eCommerce — NPG payment gateway: Payment verification returns 404 for unknown PA domain
